curation_notes: Patch commit d86e185 was directly referenced in the advisory. It modifies 2 source files: lib/VM/Interpreter.cpp (transientObjectPutErrorMessage function, which shared a single SmallU16String allocator between two getUTF16Ref calls) and include/hermes/VM/StringView.h (added assertion that allocator must be empty in getUTF16Ref). Primary vulnerability location is in Interpreter.cpp where the shared allocator caused a use-after-free when the second getUTF16Ref call invalidated the reference returned by the first. The fix uses two separate allocators. StringView.h updated the API contract to require an empty allocator. No sibling files in lib/VM/ share this vulnerability pattern. Re-curated to differentiate L3 hints from L1/L2 per updated guidelines.
